case_title: CHARYN ASSET MANAGMENT GROUP, INC. VS. FATBURGER NORTH AMERICAN, INC.

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARYN ASSET MANAGMENT GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FATBURGER NORTH AMERICAN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-26-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 IN ORDER TO SERVE DEFENDANT FATBURGER NORTH AMERICAN, INC. CONTINUANCE IS AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE KEVIN BURTSCHER, CFO AT CHARYN ASSET MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CHARYN ASSET MANAGMENT GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FATBURGER NORTH AMERICAN, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARYN ASSET MANAGMENT GROUP, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHARYN ASSET MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE KEVIN BURTSCHER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF CHARYN ASSET MANAGMENT GROUP ADDRESS UPDATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARYN ASSET MANAGMENT GROUP, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED SEP-19-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FATBURGER NORTH AMERICAN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARYN ASSET MANAGMENT GROUP, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FATBURGER NORTH AMERICAN, INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
